data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of rescheduling a single instance, but the linked use case does not provide any evidence or mention of this capability. The use case only describes the ability to move one cleaning to Thursday for that week, which does not equate to a general rescheduling capability. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not confirm the requirement or capture a gap related to rescheduling.
gaps: The ability to reschedule a single instance is not explicitly defined in the use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the rescheduling requirement.
